component.name: Apedi
component.summary: Fast, simple text editor with projects and terminal

description.p: Apedi is a lightweight GTK 4 / GtkSourceView 5 editor with bundled code formatters, multi-project sidebar, integrated terminal, and the small set of IDE conveniences a polyglot developer reaches for daily.

ul.li: Code formatting (Ctrl+Shift+I) via bundled black, prettier, gofmt, rustfmt, clang-format, shfmt
Multi-project sidebar with .gitignore awareness, per-extension icons and colors
Quick Open (Ctrl+P), Find in Files (Ctrl+Shift+F), Go to Symbol (Ctrl+M)
Integrated VTE terminal with bash and zsh (Ctrl+`)
Optional autosave, crash recovery, external-change watcher
Auto / light / dark theme; localized UI (English, Polski)

description.p: Quick Open, Find in Files, integrated About, snippets, crash recovery, file watcher, expanded keyboard cheat-sheet.
Multiple open projects in the sidebar.
Tabbed Preferences, internationalization (Polish), autosave, file-manager registration toggle.
Gitignore-aware sidebar, ignore patterns, compact mode, symbol palette.
Project sidebar, What's New dialog, Replace on Ctrl+R, integrated terminal.
Preferences dialog, dark mode, snap startup fixes.
